sources.title: 《淮南子·天文训》 / Huainanzi, Celestial Patterns

sources.citation_en: Huainanzi, 'Celestial Patterns,' Chinese Text Project electronic text.

sources.title: 《春秋繁露·五行相生》 / Luxuriant Gems of the Spring and Autumn Annals

sources.citation_en: Traditionally attributed to Dong Zhongshu, Chunqiu fanlu, 'Mutual Generation of the Five Phases,' Chinese Text Project.

sources.citation_en: Wang Chong, Lunheng, 'On Death,' Chinese Text Project electronic text.

sources.citation_en: Wang Chong, Lunheng, 'Reprimands and Admonitions,' Chinese Text Project electronic text.

sources.title: 王弼《周易略例·明象》 / Zhouyi lueli, Clarifying Images
sources.citation_zh: 王弼：《周易略例·明象》，维基文库校录本。
sources.citation_en: Wang Bi, Zhouyi lueli, 'Clarifying Images,' Wikisource digital text.

sources.title: 嵇康《养生论》 / Discourse on Nourishing Life
sources.citation_zh: 嵇康：《养生论》，维基文库校录本。
sources.citation_en: Ji Kang, 'Discourse on Nourishing Life,' Wikisource digital text.

sources.citation_en: Guo Xiang, Commentary on the Zhuangzi, 'Free and Easy Wandering,' Chinese Text Project facsimile.

sources.title: 僧肇《肇论·物不迁论》 / Things Do Not Shift
sources.citation_zh: 僧肇：《肇论·物不迁论》，《大正藏》第45册第1858号，CBETA。
sources.citation_en: Sengzhao, Zhao lun, 'Things Do Not Shift,' Taisho 45 no. 1858, CBETA.

sources.title: 法藏《华严一乘教义分齐章》 / Treatise on the Five Teachings
sources.citation_zh: 法藏：《华严一乘教义分齐章》卷四，《大正藏》第45册第1866号，CBETA。
sources.citation_en: Fazang, Treatise on the Five Teachings, juan 4, Taisho 45 no. 1866, CBETA.

sources.title: 柳宗元《天说》 / Discourse on Heaven
sources.citation_zh: 柳宗元：《天说》，维基文库校录本。
sources.citation_en: Liu Zongyuan, 'Discourse on Heaven,' Wikisource digital text.

sources.title: 宗密《原人论》 / Inquiry into the Origin of Humanity
sources.citation_zh: 宗密：《原人论》，《大正藏》第45册第1886号，CBETA。
sources.citation_en: Zongmi, Inquiry into the Origin of Humanity, Taisho 45 no. 1886, CBETA.

sources.title: 《临济慧照禅师语录》 / Record of Linji
sources.citation_zh: 《镇州临济慧照禅师语录》，《大正藏》第47册第1985号，CBETA。
sources.citation_en: Record of Linji, Taisho 47 no. 1985, CBETA.

sources.title: 韩愈《原道》 / Inquiry into the Way
sources.citation_zh: 韩愈：《原道》，维基文库校录本。
sources.citation_en: Han Yu, 'Inquiry into the Way,' Wikisource digital text.

sources.title: 葛洪《抱朴子内篇》 / Baopuzi neipian
sources.citation_zh: 葛洪：《抱朴子内篇》，中国哲学书电子化计划。
sources.citation_en: Ge Hong, Baopuzi neipian, Chinese Text Project digital edition.

claims.text_zh: 宇宙秩序由未分化状态逐层展开：道始于虚廓，虚廓产生宇宙，宇宙产生气，清浊之气分别形成天与地。
claims.text_en: Cosmic order unfolds in stages from undifferentiation: the Way begins in empty expanse, which generates the cosmos; the cosmos generates qi, whose clear and turbid portions form heaven and earth.
claims.explanation_zh: 该段把道、空间、气和天地组织成发生序列，不能简化成现代物理学的宇宙模型。
claims.explanation_en: The passage orders Way, expanse, qi, heaven, and earth into a cosmogonic sequence; it should not be recast as modern physical cosmology.
claims.excerpt_text: 道始于虚霩，虚霩生宇宙，宇宙生气。气有涯垠，清阳者薄靡而为天，重浊者凝滞而为地。
claims.attribution_note: 《淮南子》是刘安主持的宫廷集体编纂，节点归于其思想工程，不声称为刘安亲笔独作。

claims.text_zh: 五行的相生次序不仅说明自然变化，也被用作君臣、父子和治理职能的分类模型。
claims.text_en: The generative sequence of the Five Phases explains not only natural change but also classifies ruler-minister, parent-child, and governmental functions.
claims.explanation_zh: 《春秋繁露》把宇宙分类投射到政治秩序；今本篇章归属与层次有争议，因此仅标传统归属。
claims.explanation_en: The received Chunqiu fanlu maps cosmological classification onto political order; because its textual strata and authorship are disputed, the claim is marked as traditionally attributed.
claims.locator: 《春秋繁露·五行相生》第五十八
claims.excerpt_text: 天地之气，合而为一，分为阴阳，判为四时，列为五行。
claims.attribution_note: 《春秋繁露》今本不是可以逐篇无条件归于董仲舒的单一作者文本；按传统思想谱系归属。

claims.text_zh: 死亡使精气耗散、知觉终止；死者既无知觉，就不能成为有意志并能伤人的鬼。
claims.text_en: Death disperses vital essence and ends awareness; because the dead lack cognition, they cannot become intentional ghosts capable of harming people.
claims.explanation_zh: 王充以知觉依赖生命活动反驳鬼能知、能害人的通俗信念，但他的气论并不等同现代唯物主义。
claims.explanation_en: Wang Chong argues from cognition's dependence on living activity against ghosts that know and harm, without thereby becoming a modern materialist.
claims.locator: 《论衡·论死》开篇及人死不为鬼段
claims.excerpt_text: 人之所以生者，精气也；死而精气灭。能为精气者，血脉也；人死血脉竭，竭而精气灭，灭而形体朽，朽而成灰土，何用为鬼？
claims.attribution_note: 《论衡》传世本中王充的系统论辩。

claims.text_zh: 语言与卦象都是把握意义的工具；一旦真正把握意义，就不应执著于固定的言辞与图象。
claims.text_en: Words and images are instruments for grasping meaning; once meaning is genuinely grasped, one should not cling to fixed formulations or images.
claims.explanation_zh: “得意忘言”不是拒绝语言，而是区分媒介与目标，要求解释者穿过符号把握其所以然。
claims.explanation_en: Forgetting words after grasping meaning is not anti-language; it distinguishes interpretive media from their goal.
claims.excerpt_text: 夫象者，出意者也；言者，明象者也。尽意莫若象，尽象莫若言……故言者所以明象，得象而忘言；象者所以存意，得意而忘象。
claims.attribution_note: 《周易略例》传统与文本系统稳定归于王弼。

claims.text_zh: 养生要使形体与精神彼此依存地获得保养，通过节欲、安神与导养尽其自然寿命。
claims.text_en: Nourishing life preserves body and spirit in their mutual dependence, using moderated desire, tranquility, and cultivation to fulfill one's natural lifespan.
claims.explanation_zh: 嵇康并非声称必然长生不死，而是论证系统修养能够显著延寿；其数字化寿命主张属于古代养生语境。
claims.explanation_en: Ji Kang does not promise inevitable immortality but argues that systematic cultivation can extend life; numerical longevity claims belong to an ancient regimen context.
claims.locator: 《养生论》形神相亲、导养得理段
claims.excerpt_text: 形恃神以立，神须形以存……导养得理，以尽性命，上获千余岁，下可数百年。
claims.attribution_note: 数字寿命保留为文本历史主张，不作为医学事实背书。

claims.text_zh: 真正的逍遥不是取消差异和条件，而是每一事物安于自身性分、适合其所依条件，因而都能在各自尺度上自得。
claims.text_en: Genuine freedom does not abolish differences and conditions; each thing follows its own allotment and fits its dependencies, thereby attaining ease on its own scale.
claims.explanation_zh: 郭象借大鹏与小鸟说明大小虽异，只要各称其性，逍遥并无等级。
claims.explanation_en: Through the great Peng and small birds, Guo Xiang argues that differing scales do not rank freedom when each fits its nature.
claims.locator: 郭象《庄子注·逍遥游》大鹏与小鸟比较段
claims.excerpt_text: 苟足于其性，则虽大鹏无以自贵于小鸟，小鸟无羡于天池，而荣愿有余矣。故小大虽殊，逍遥一也。
claims.attribution_note: 这是郭象注文的规范化概括，不与《庄子》经文作者混同。

claims.text_zh: 求仙术不能替代伦理实践；忠孝、和顺、仁信是长生修炼的根本，德行不足则服药也无益。
claims.text_en: Techniques of immortality cannot replace ethical practice: loyalty, filiality, harmony, humaneness, and trust are the foundation, and medicines are useless without sufficient virtue.
claims.explanation_zh: 葛洪把方术嵌入功过伦理，显示其仙道并非纯粹技术主义。
claims.explanation_en: Ge Hong embeds techniques within a moral economy of merit, showing that his pursuit of transcendence is not purely technological.
claims.locator: 《抱朴子内篇·对俗》论求仙者积善段
claims.excerpt_text: 欲求仙者，要当以忠孝和顺仁信为本。若德行不修，而但务方术，皆不得长生也。
claims.attribution_note: 据传世《抱朴子内篇》归于葛洪。

claims.text_zh: 运动与静止不是彼此排斥的绝对属性：事物在迁流中不离当下位置，因此即动而静、即静而动。
claims.text_en: Motion and stillness are not mutually exclusive absolutes: in temporal flow a thing does not depart from its present locus, so it is still in motion and moving in stillness.
claims.explanation_zh: 《物不迁论》借悖论式语言破除把时间理解为实体从过去搬运到现在的执著，不宜直接等同现代物理理论。
claims.explanation_en: The essay uses paradox to unsettle reified temporal transfer; it should not be identified with modern physics.
claims.excerpt_text: 旋岚偃岳而常静，江河竞注而不流，野马飘鼓而不动，日月历天而不周。
claims.attribution_note: 以僧肇现存论书为依据；悖论须结合全文理解。

claims.text_zh: 在缘起法界中，一个事物与一切事物相即相入而不丧失各自差别；“一即一切”不是把所有事物混成同一实体。
claims.text_en: Within the dependently arisen dharma realm, one thing and all things interpenetrate without losing their differences; 'one is all' does not collapse everything into one substance.
claims.explanation_zh: 法藏以十玄门说明圆教的无碍关系，必须同时保留相即与差别。
claims.explanation_en: Fazang's ten mysteries articulate nonobstruction while preserving both identity and difference.
claims.locator: T45 no.1866卷四，十玄缘起无碍法门段
claims.excerpt_text: 一即一切，一切即一；一切即一时，一即一切时。
claims.attribution_note: 据法藏署名著作的传世大藏经本。

claims.text_zh: 儒家之道通过尧、舜、禹、汤、文武周公、孔子、孟子的历史传递延续；孟子以后传承中断，需要重新接续。
claims.text_en: The Confucian Way is historically transmitted through Yao, Shun, Yu, Tang, Kings Wen and Wu, the Duke of Zhou, Confucius, and Mencius; after Mencius the succession was interrupted and requires renewal.
claims.explanation_zh: 这是韩愈建构的道统叙事，而不是可以不经考证地当作实际师承谱系。
claims.explanation_en: This is Han Yu's construction of succession of the Way, not an unproblematic record of actual teacher-disciple transmission.
claims.excerpt_text: 尧以是传之舜，舜以是传之禹，禹以是传之汤，汤以是传之文、武、周公，文、武、周公传之孔子，孔子传之孟轲。轲之死，不得其传焉。
claims.attribution_note: 明确标作韩愈的规范性历史建构。

claims.text_zh: 自然过程与人的治乱功祸各有因果，天不能奖善罚恶；政治责任必须归于人的制度和行动。
claims.text_en: Natural processes and human order or disorder have distinct causal domains; Heaven does not reward good and punish evil, so political responsibility belongs to human institutions and action.
claims.explanation_zh: 柳宗元反对把自然灾异解释为天意谴告，但并非否认自然规律。
claims.explanation_en: Liu Zongyuan rejects reading disasters as Heaven's moral reprimands without denying natural regularities.
claims.locator: 《天说》论天与人各行其功祸段
claims.excerpt_text: 功者自功，祸者自祸，欲望其赏罚者大谬；呼而怨，欲望其哀且仁者，愈大谬矣。
claims.attribution_note: 与刘禹锡天论往复的语境须保留；此处仅概括柳宗元反灾异目的论的一面。

claims.text_zh: 众生的根源是本来觉明的真实心；迷妄并未消灭此根源，修行因此是显发本觉而非从无创造佛性。
claims.text_en: The source of sentient beings is an originally aware true mind; delusion does not destroy it, so practice manifests original awakening rather than creating Buddha-nature from nothing.
claims.explanation_zh: 宗密用本觉真心统摄华严与禅，但其判教也对不同教说作层级安排。
claims.explanation_en: Zongmi uses the originally awakened true mind to integrate Huayan and Chan while ranking teachings hierarchically.
claims.locator: T45 no.1886《原人论》会通本末段
claims.excerpt_text: 一切有情皆有本觉真心，无始以来常住清净，昭昭不昧，了了常知。
claims.attribution_note: 据宗密《原人论》大藏经本。

relations.note_zh: 同一文献工程中，道的包容性由气化宇宙论获得发生论展开。
relations.note_en: Within the same textual project, the encompassing Way receives a cosmogonic articulation through qi.
relations.excerpt_text: 道始于虚霩，虚霩生宇宙，宇宙生气。

relations.note_zh: 五行分类为天人感应和灾异政治提供宇宙论框架。
relations.note_en: Five-Phase classification supplies a cosmological frame for omen politics.
relations.excerpt_text: 天地之气，合而为一，分为阴阳，判为四时，列为五行。

relations.note_zh: 王充明确点名董仲舒的天谴说并从自然因果方向批评。
relations.note_en: Wang Chong explicitly names and criticizes Dong Zhongshu's doctrine of heavenly reprimands.
relations.locator: 《论衡·谴告》开篇，点名董仲舒段
relations.excerpt_text: 董仲舒言：王者有过，天地灾之；有大过，天谴告之。此言虚也。

relations.note_zh: 自然气化论延伸为对死后有意志鬼神的否定。
relations.note_en: Spontaneous qi cosmology extends into denial of intentional postmortem ghosts.
relations.excerpt_text: 人之所以生者，精气也；死而精气灭。

relations.note_zh: 两者都以无说明有的根源，但不能由相似性推出直接师承。
relations.note_en: Both ground being in nonbeing, but similarity alone does not establish transmission.
relations.excerpt_text: 象生于意，故可寻象以观意。

relations.note_zh: 贵无本体论与越过言象把握统宗的解释方法互相支撑。
relations.note_en: The metaphysics of nonbeing aligns with an interpretive method that moves beyond signs to their organizing meaning.
relations.excerpt_text: 得象而忘言，得意而忘象。

relations.note_zh: 《崇有论》针对魏晋贵无风气反论“无不能生”；与王弼命题构成明确学派对立，但现存段未逐字点名王弼。
relations.note_en: Pei's Valuing Being opposes the contemporary priority of nonbeing, though the surviving passage does not name Wang Bi directly.
relations.excerpt_text: 夫至无者，无以能生，故始生者自生也。

relations.note_zh: 两论都拒绝把外物机械等同内在情感，并强调主体状态的中介。
relations.note_en: Both essays reject mechanically identifying external stimuli with inner affect and emphasize the subject's condition.
relations.excerpt_text: 形恃神以立，神须形以存。

relations.note_zh: 两者都谈逍遥，但阮籍突出超越名教，郭象强调安于性分；是有差异的相似而非传承断言。
relations.note_en: Both discuss freedom, but Ruan stresses transcendence of convention while Guo stresses fitting one's allotment.
relations.locator: 郭象《逍遥游注》大小虽殊段
relations.excerpt_text: 小大虽殊，逍遥一也。

relations.note_zh: 向秀《难养生论》明确针对嵇康的养生方案，主张承认自然情欲并以礼节之。
relations.note_en: Xiang Xiu's Objections explicitly addresses Ji Kang's regimen and defends natural affect under ritual regulation.
relations.locator: 《难嵇叔夜养生论》篇题及生之为乐段
relations.excerpt_text: 且生之为乐，以恩爱相接……此天理之自然，人之所宜。

relations.note_zh: 两者都否认绝对无能生成有，但郭象的独化论进一步取消统一造物主。
relations.note_en: Both deny that absolute nothing generates beings, while Guo's self-transformation further removes a single creator.
relations.excerpt_text: 苟足于其性，则虽大鹏无以自贵于小鸟。

relations.note_zh: 仙术可学受到伦理条件限制，避免把葛洪理解为单纯技术主义。
relations.note_en: The learnability of immortality is qualified by ethical prerequisites.
relations.excerpt_text: 若德行不修，而但务方术，皆不得长生也。

relations.note_zh: 火烛喻与刀刃喻都主张精神不能离形独存；尚无本批证据证明范缜直接继承桓谭。
relations.note_en: The candle and blade analogies both deny disembodied spirit, without proving direct transmission.
relations.locator: 《梁书·范缜传》所载《神灭论》开篇
relations.excerpt_text: 神之于质，犹利之于刃……岂容形亡而神在？

relations.note_zh: 不真空与物不迁都以不二论证反对把空、动静实体化。
relations.note_en: Both essays use nonduality to resist reifying emptiness, motion, and stillness.
relations.excerpt_text: 江河竞注而不流。

relations.note_zh: 吉藏继承中国中观传统的破执语言，但本条不把思想谱系自动升级为直接文本依赖。
relations.note_en: Jizang develops Chinese Madhyamaka anti-reification, but lineage is not automatically direct textual dependence.
relations.excerpt_text: 二谛者，盖是言教之通诠，相待之假称。

relations.note_zh: 众生可成佛与自性本净共享佛性普遍性的方向，但相隔数百年，不能据此认定直接传承。
relations.note_en: Universal Buddhahood and intrinsically pure self-nature share a universal Buddha-nature orientation without proving direct transmission.
relations.excerpt_text: 何期自性，本自清净。

relations.note_zh: 传统华严谱系由杜顺法界观走向法藏十玄门；因杜顺文本归属有争议，谨标 probable。
relations.note_en: Traditional Huayan lineage develops from Dushun's contemplation to Fazang's ten mysteries; disputed attribution warrants probable status.
relations.excerpt_text: 一即一切，一切即一。

relations.note_zh: 一念三千与一即一切都建立部分—整体互摄结构，但属于不同宗派论证。
relations.note_en: Three thousand realms in one thought and one-is-all share part-whole interpenetration while belonging to distinct schools.
relations.excerpt_text: 一切即一时，一即一切时。

relations.note_zh: 窥基注疏明确传录并解释玄奘的真唯识量，属于可定位的师承文本关系。
relations.note_en: Kuiji's commentary explicitly records and interprets Xuanzang's consciousness-only inference.
relations.locator: T44 no.1840卷上，疏释玄奘真唯识量
relations.excerpt_text: 真故极成色，定不离眼识。

relations.note_zh: 摄心息想与自性本净构成修行重心差异；不采用后出南北宗故事证明二人直接辩论。
relations.note_en: Concentrating and quieting mind contrasts with intrinsic purity; later sectarian stories are not used as proof of direct debate.
relations.excerpt_text: 何期自性，本自清净。

relations.note_zh: 神会以无念、无作推进南宗话语；现存《显宗记》文本较晚，故不标 explicit。
relations.note_en: Shenhui develops Southern Chan discourse through no-thought and nonfabrication; the late received text warrants probable status.
relations.excerpt_text: 无念为宗，无作为本。

relations.note_zh: 洪州禅在南宗谱系中把自性论推进为即心是佛；灯录成书较晚，证据限为 probable。
relations.note_en: Hongzhou Chan develops Southern-lineage self-nature into mind-is-Buddha; late lamp records limit certainty.
relations.excerpt_text: 各信自心是佛，此心即是佛心。

relations.note_zh: 黄檗的一心论属于马祖—百丈—黄檗的洪州禅传统，但本批未以同时代文书证明直接文本传递。
relations.note_en: Huangbo's One Mind belongs to the Mazu-Baizhang-Huangbo Hongzhou line, but direct textual transmission is not proven here.
relations.excerpt_text: 诸佛与一切众生，唯是一心，更无别法。

relations.note_zh: 《临济录》明确记载临济在黄檗会下参学并因问佛法大意受棒，构成可定位师承证据。
relations.note_en: The Record of Linji explicitly places Linji under Huangbo and records his questioning and blows, providing located teacher-disciple evidence.
relations.locator: T47 no.1985行录，临济在黄檗会下问佛法大意段
relations.excerpt_text: 师初在黄檗会下，行业纯一。首座乃叹曰：虽是后生，与众有异。遂问：上座在此多少时？师云：三年。

relations.note_zh: 韩愈明确把孔子列为道统传递环节；这是韩愈自述的谱系建构，不等同现代史家结论。
relations.note_en: Han Yu explicitly places Confucius in his succession of the Way; this is Han's own genealogy, not a neutral historical finding.
relations.excerpt_text: 文、武、周公传之孔子，孔子传之孟轲。

relations.note_zh: 韩愈明确将孟子置于孔子之后，并宣称孟子死后失传。
relations.note_en: Han Yu explicitly places Mencius after Confucius and claims the transmission lapsed after him.
relations.excerpt_text: 孔子传之孟轲。轲之死，不得其传焉。

relations.note_zh: 李翱在唐代儒学复兴语境中把韩愈的人伦之道推进为复性工夫；本条未提供直接点名引文。
relations.note_en: Li Ao develops Tang Confucian revival toward recovery of nature, but this relation lacks a direct naming excerpt.
relations.excerpt_text: 人之所以为圣人者，性也；人之所以惑其性者，情也。

relations.note_zh: 复性与显发本觉都采用本体清明、后被遮蔽的结构，但不能据此证明单向借用。
relations.note_en: Recovery of nature and manifestation of original awakening share an obscured-original-purity structure without proving borrowing.
relations.excerpt_text: 本觉真心，无始以来常住清净。

relations.note_zh: 宗密以真心论重述华严圆教并会通禅宗；属明确学派继承，但本证据条只支持教义连续。
relations.note_en: Zongmi restates Huayan through true mind and integrates Chan; school inheritance is clear, though this excerpt supports doctrine rather than direct contact.
relations.excerpt_text: 一切有情皆有本觉真心。

relations.note_zh: 天谴政治与天人各行其因果构成明确理论对立；柳文此段未点名董仲舒，故不标历史影响。
relations.note_en: Heavenly reprimands conflict with separate natural and human causation; Liu's passage does not name Dong.
relations.excerpt_text: 功者自功，祸者自祸，欲望其赏罚者大谬。

relations.note_zh: 二者都拒绝有意志的天对政治进行赏罚，但无证据证明柳宗元直接承袭王充。
relations.note_en: Both reject an intentional Heaven rewarding and punishing politics, without proof of direct transmission.
relations.excerpt_text: 欲望其赏罚者大谬。

relations.note_zh: 民生因果与制度因势而生都把政治解释置于人事，而非超自然意旨。
relations.note_en: Material livelihood and historically emergent institutions both locate political explanation in human affairs.
relations.excerpt_text: 故封建非圣人意也，势也。

relations.note_zh: 两者都以人伦秩序为教育与道德实践中心，但班昭性别等级不可被韩愈的博爱定义抹平。
relations.note_en: Both center ethical relations, but Ban Zhao's gender hierarchy must not be erased by Han's broad-love definition.
relations.excerpt_text: 博爱之谓仁，行而宜之之谓义。

relations.note_zh: 本觉真心解释何以能够顿悟，渐修则处理悟后习气，二者构成宗密系统。
relations.note_en: Originally awakened mind explains sudden awakening, while gradual cultivation addresses residual habits.
relations.excerpt_text: 本觉真心，无始以来常住清净。

relations.note_zh: 汉代气化宇宙论与张载太虚即气都以气解释天地生成，但相隔千年且理论结构不同。
relations.note_en: Han qi-cosmogony and Zhang Zai's Great Void both explain cosmic generation through qi, without implying direct transmission.
relations.excerpt_text: 宇宙生气。气有涯垠，清阳者薄靡而为天，重浊者凝滞而为地。

relations.note_zh: 五行—阴阳的汉代关联框架与周敦颐太极图说共享宇宙生成分类，但本条不声称直接文本依赖。
relations.note_en: Han correlative Five-Phase cosmology and Zhou Dunyi's generative scheme share classifications without proving direct dependence.
relations.excerpt_text: 分为阴阳，判为四时，列为五行。

relations.note_zh: 韩愈重建道统的儒学复兴为北宋道学提供前史，但本条只作时代与传统桥接，不虚构直接师承。
relations.note_en: Han Yu's reconstruction of Confucian succession forms a prehistory to Northern Song learning without constituting direct teacher-disciple transmission.
relations.excerpt_text: 轲之死，不得其传焉。

relations.note_zh: 李翱复性论是唐宋心性论的重要前史，程颐性即理则在另一概念架构中系统化本性。
relations.note_en: Li Ao's recovery of nature is an important antecedent to Song debates, while Cheng Yi systematizes nature in a distinct principle framework.
relations.excerpt_text: 人之所以为圣人者，性也；人之所以惑其性者，情也。

relations.note_zh: 司马谈的六家论与《淮南子》的道论都体现汉初汇通诸子资源的倾向；二者相近不等于直接传承。
relations.note_en: Sima Tan's survey of the six schools and the Huainanzi both exemplify early Han synthesis without establishing direct transmission.
relations.locator: 《史记·太史公自序》所录《论六家要旨》总评及道家段
relations.excerpt_text: 《易大传》：天下一致而百虑，同归而殊涂。夫阴阳、儒、墨、名、法、道德，此务为治者也。

relations.note_zh: 司马迁按承担死亡的目的评价生命终结，嵇康则讨论如何尽其自然寿命；二者是伦理重心的对照，不是历史争论。
relations.note_en: Sima Qian evaluates death by purpose while Ji Kang seeks fulfillment of natural lifespan; this is a conceptual contrast, not a historical debate.
relations.locator: 《汉书·司马迁传》所录《报任安书》“人固有一死”段
relations.excerpt_text: 人固有一死，或重于泰山，或轻于鸿毛，用之所趋异也。

relations.note_zh: 扬雄以善恶混修正纯粹性恶判断，把道德结果归于对两类倾向的修治；原段未点名荀子。
relations.note_en: Yang Xiong qualifies a purely bad-nature thesis by positing mixed tendencies and cultivation; the passage does not name Xunzi.
relations.locator: 《扬子法言·修身卷第三》“人之性也善恶混”章
relations.excerpt_text: 人之性也善恶混。修其善则为善人，修其恶则为恶人。

relations.note_zh: 郑玄把礼解释为构成人之整体的“体”，可视为对先秦儒家礼教的汉代经学展开；本条不虚构孔郑直接传承。
relations.note_en: Zheng Xuan's body analogy develops early Confucian ritual through Han classical scholarship without implying direct transmission from Confucius.
relations.locator: 《礼记郑氏注》卷十《礼器》“礼也者犹体也”章
relations.excerpt_text: 礼也者，犹体也。体不备，君子谓之不成人。

relations.note_zh: 支遁以“不物于物”界定至人逍遥，反对仅以各足其性理解自由；佚文通过《世说新语》注保存，故谨标 probable。
relations.note_en: Zhi Dun defines freedom as not being enslaved by things, contrasting with satisfaction of allotment; fragmentary transmission warrants probable status.
relations.locator: 《世说新语·文学》第32则刘孝标注引支氏《逍遥论》
relations.excerpt_text: 物物而不物于物，则遥然不我得；玄感不为，不疾而速，则逍然靡不适。

relations.note_zh: 慧远承认在家者礼敬君亲，却为出家者主张方外身份，因而对普遍臣民礼制作范围限制；并非否定全部儒家伦理。
relations.note_en: Huiyuan accepts lay ritual obligations but limits their scope for monastics as guests beyond the realm, rather than rejecting all Confucian ethics.
relations.locator: T52 no.2102卷五《沙门不敬王者论·出家第二》
relations.excerpt_text: 出家则是方外之宾，迹绝于物……皆遁世以求其志，变俗以达其道。

relations.note_zh: 达摩归名的二入四行把理入与具体行持并置，神秀系禅法继续强调摄心实践；因达摩文本归属和中间传承复杂，仅标 probable。
relations.note_en: The attributed Two Entrances joins insight and practices, while Shenxiu's line continues disciplined mind cultivation; attribution and transmission complexity limit this to probable.
relations.locator: 敦煌本《二入四行论长卷子》二入总纲及行入段，研究本PDF第141页
relations.excerpt_text: 夫入道多途，要而言之，不出二种：一是理入，二是行入。

relations.note_zh: 后世《系辞》塑造的伏羲观象制卦叙事，为王弼言—象—意解释学提供经典对象；这不是伏羲与王弼之间的历史师承。
relations.note_en: The later Xici image of Fuxi creating trigrams supplies a received textual object for Wang Bi's word-image-meaning hermeneutics, not a historical transmission from Fuxi.
relations.locator: 《周易·系辞下》第二章，包牺氏作八卦段
relations.excerpt_text: 仰则观象于天，俯则观法于地……于是始作八卦。

relations.note_zh: 《淮南子》塑造的神农教稼尝草形象与《管子》重视衣食仓廪都把民生物质条件置于治理基础；不表示传说神农影响了管仲。
relations.note_en: The Huainanzi's later Shennong narrative and the Guanzi both ground governance in material livelihood, without claiming influence by a historical Shennong.
relations.locator: 《淮南子·修务训》神农教民播种、尝百草段
relations.excerpt_text: 神农乃始教民播种五谷，相土地宜……尝百草之滋味。

relations.note_zh: 《黄帝内经》借黄帝问答塑造节饮食、常起居、形神俱全的养生传统，与嵇康形神相依的养生论相近；黄帝是文本归属形象，不作历史传承。
relations.note_en: The received Huangdi dialogue on regulated life resembles Ji Kang's body-spirit regimen; Huangdi functions as a textual attribution, not a historical transmitter.
relations.locator: 《黄帝内经素问·上古天真论》第一节，黄帝问、岐伯答段
relations.excerpt_text: 食饮有节，起居有常，不妄作劳，故能形与神俱。

relations.note_zh: 《尚书》塑造的尧德教万邦形象被韩愈道统叙事置于起点；本关系只记录后世文本重用传说圣王形象，不确认历史师承。
relations.note_en: The Shangshu's textual Yao becomes the starting figure in Han Yu's genealogy; this records later reuse of a sage image, not verified transmission.
relations.excerpt_text: 克明俊德，以亲九族……百姓昭明，协和万邦。

relations.note_zh: 《舜典》塑造的音乐教化人格叙事与嵇康“声无哀乐”的声情区分形成概念张力；不把传说舜视为嵇康的历史论敌。
relations.note_en: The Shundian's textual music-education ideal contrasts with Ji Kang's separation of sound and emotion, without making legendary Shun a historical opponent.
relations.excerpt_text: 命汝典乐，教胄子：直而温，宽而栗，刚而无虐，简而无傲。

relations.note_zh: 《大禹谟》归于禹的“政在养民”与王符国家以民谷为本相近；前者是后世经典塑造，不作历史影响断言。
relations.note_en: The received Great Plan of Yu's governance nourishing the people resembles Wang Fu's people-and-grain foundation, without asserting influence by historical Yu.
relations.excerpt_text: 德惟善政，政在养民。

relations.note_zh: 传统归于文王的乾卦经文是王弼言象意解释学所解释的经典对象；只表示文本传统，不确认文王作者身份或跨世师承。
relations.note_en: The Qian statement traditionally attributed to King Wen is an object of Wang Bi's hermeneutics; this records textual tradition, not verified authorship or transmission.
relations.excerpt_text: 乾：元亨，利贞。

relations.note_zh: 《康诰》传统塑造的明德慎罚政治与韩愈把周公列入道统相接；仅记录后世谱系对经典圣王形象的组织。
relations.note_en: The Kanggao's bright-virtue/cautious-punishment image connects to Han Yu's placement of the Duke of Zhou in his genealogy, as later textual organization rather than verified transmission.
relations.excerpt_text: 惟乃丕显考文王，克明德慎罚，弗敢侮鳏寡。

relations.note_zh: 《管子》把仓廪衣食作为礼义条件，王符把民、谷、农时构成国家因果链，均突出治理的物质基础。
relations.note_en: The Guanzi and Wang Fu both foreground material livelihood as a condition of political order.
relations.excerpt_text: 仓廪实，则知礼节；衣食足，则知荣辱。

relations.note_zh: 《论语》中的颜回明确以“夫子”称述博文约礼的教学；本图只连观点层面的师教内容，不把编纂文本自动升级为可核实逐字记录。
relations.note_en: Analects Yan Hui explicitly reports the Master's broad learning and ritual restraint, but the compiled text is not treated as a verbatim historical transcript.
relations.excerpt_text: 夫子循循然善诱人，博我以文，约我以礼。

relations.note_zh: 《论语》让曾子以忠恕解释孔子“一以贯之”，是明确的文本内解释关系；仍保持 conceptual-only 以区分编纂记录与历史影响证明。
relations.note_en: The Analects has Zengzi interpret Confucius's single thread as zhong and shu, an explicit intratextual interpretation retained as conceptual-only.
relations.excerpt_text: 曾子曰：夫子之道，忠恕而已矣。

relations.note_zh: 传统归于子思的《中庸》以诚连接天道人道，李翱复性论以清明本性解释成圣工夫；前者作者与层次有争议，不写成确定师承。
relations.note_en: The traditionally Zisi-attributed Zhongyong links Heaven and cultivation through sincerity, resembling Li Ao's recovery of nature without proving transmission.
relations.excerpt_text: 诚者，天之道也；诚之者，人之道也。

relations.note_zh: 传世《列子》的常生常化与郭象独化都把生成理解为持续过程；《列子》成书年代与列御寇历史性有争议，故不作影响断言。
relations.note_en: The received Liezi's ceaseless transformation resembles Guo Xiang's self-transformation; disputed dating and historicity bar an influence claim.
relations.excerpt_text: 常生常化者，无时不生，无时不化。

relations.note_zh: 杨朱“为我”仅由思想对手孟子的批评性传述支持，与孟子扩充恻隐之心的伦理方向相冲突；不能据此重建杨朱完整体系。
relations.note_en: Yang Zhu's 'for oneself' is known here through Mengzi's polemical report and contrasts with extending compassion; it cannot reconstruct Yang's full system.
relations.excerpt_text: 杨子取为我，拔一毛而利天下，不为也。

relations.note_zh: 《孙子》先胜后战与银雀山《孙膑兵法》事备后动都把准备置于交战之前；仅作文本思想比较，不确认作者间直接传承。
relations.note_en: Sunzi's victory-before-battle and the excavated Sun Bin text's action-after-preparation share a strategic priority without proving direct authorial transmission.
relations.locator: 银雀山汉简《孙膑兵法·见威王》开篇
relations.excerpt_text: 兵非所乐也，而胜非所利也。事备而后动。

relations.note_zh: 《孟子》经陈相转述许行的君民并耕主张并予以反驳，形成对分工与民本治理的文本内争论；许行无自著存世。
relations.note_en: Mengzi reports through Chen Xiang and rebuts Xu Xing's ruler-farms-with-people thesis, an intratextual debate preserved without Xu's own writings.
relations.locator: 《孟子·滕文公上》第四章，陈相转述许行之言
relations.excerpt_text: 贤者与民并耕而食，饔飧而治。

relations.note_zh: 《庄子·天下》所述慎到弃知缘不得已，与韩非以赏罚机制替代君主私人好恶都削弱个人意志的治理作用；未据此编造师承。
relations.note_en: The Zhuangzi report on Shendao's following necessity and Han Fei's impersonal handles both reduce private will in governance, without asserting transmission.
relations.excerpt_text: 慎到，弃知去己，而缘不得已，泠汰于物以为道理。

relations.note_zh: 《察今》主张世易则变法，柳宗元以“势”解释制度生成，均反对脱离时势机械法古；无直接影响证据。
relations.note_en: Observing the Present's change-with-times and Liu Zongyuan's historical configuration both oppose mechanical archaism without proving influence.
relations.excerpt_text: 世易时移，变法宜矣。

relations.note_zh: 李斯以开放人才增强国家，韩非以赏罚控制官僚，两者分别处理国家能力的人才来源与权力约束；概念互补不等于师承。
relations.note_en: Li Si addresses talent acquisition while Han Fei addresses bureaucratic control; their statecraft is complementary without implying transmission.
relations.excerpt_text: 王者不却众庶，故能明其德……此所谓藉寇兵而赍盗粮者也。
